message:
test(proptest): add 33 property tests for workflows engine/steps and search migration controller

Coverage for 3 previously untested modules:
- proptest_workflows_engine_steps.rs (20 tests): StepResult, TextMatch,
  WaitCondition, WorkflowExecution, ExecutionStatus, WorkflowStepPolicyDecision —
  serde roundtrips + helper method contracts + state classification invariants
- proptest_search_migration_controller.rs (13 tests): MigrationPhase,
  PhaseTransitionError, HealthCheckResult, MigrationControllerConfig —
  serde roundtrips + parse/display roundtrip + state machine invariants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
